column1: # Prosthetic Access Atlas — Regional Routing Data (July 2026)
Driving distances and estimated travel times from underserved regions to nearest major CPO hubs.
- **Shortest CPO gap**: Huntington, WV → Charleston (43 mi, ~45 min)
- **Longest CPO gap**: Ashland, KY → Lexington (155 mi, ~3 hr)
- **Highest need region**: MS Delta (highest amputation rate + zero CPO)
- **Most isolated**: Pikeville, KY (140 mi to nearest CPO in Appalachia)
